title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoint).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, async & blocking stubs, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli (go)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, pull, chat with models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s spot; inline suggestions & chat.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: One-command Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, Redis, Postgres, and RAG ingestion workers.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with async streaming, dependency-injection helpers, and Blazor sample.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama embeddings & chat, all local.

title: ollama-nim-sdk
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama REST API with async/await and native JSON handling.

title: ollama-distroless
summary: Distroless container images for Ollama (~50 MB) published to cgr.dev for supply-chain security.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action to spin up Ollama service in CI for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot starter auto-configuring Ollama REST client; inject OllamaTemplate like RestTemplate.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with tokio, serde, and streaming support; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client for Ollama using std.http with no external dependencies; still experimental.
